detaileddescription.para: Uses a configuration structure provided by the caller

memberdef.argsstring: (XSdFec *InstancePtr, u32 CodeId, u32 SCOffset, u32 LAOffset, u32 QCOffset, const XSdFecLdpcParameters *ParamsPtr)
memberdef.name: XSdFecAddLdpcParams

briefdescription.para: Add LDPC parameters to a device.

detaileddescription.para: Updates LDPC code parameter registers and share tables using the specified CodeId and offsets with the specified parameters. The offsets arrays in the given XSdFec instance structure are updated with the supplied offsets for specified CodeId.

NOTE: When the device/IP has been configured to support the 5G NR standard the IP directly supports the 5G NR codes and it is not necessary to add the codes at run-time. This function will generate an assertion if used on a instance configured to support the 5G NR standard.

parameterdescription.para: Code number to be used for the specified LDPC code
Scale table offset to use for specified LDPC code
LA table offset to use for specified LDPC code
QC table offset to use for specified LDPC code
Pointer to parameters struct for the LDPC code to be added to the device

briefdescription.para: Calculate share table size for a LDPC code.

detaileddescription.para: Populates SCSizePtr, LASizePtr and QCSizePtr variables with the effective table size occupied by the specified LDPC code. These values can be used to increment the table offsets.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to parameters struct for the LDPC code being queried
Pointer to variable to populate with the effective scale table size for the specified LDPC code
Pointer to variable to populate with the effective LA table size for the specified LDPC code
Pointer to variable to populate with the effective QC table size for the specified LDPC code

briefdescription.para: Set Turbo parameters on a device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to Turbo parameters struct to be set on the device

detaileddescription.para: Queries interrupt status registers and classifies interrupt and reports recovery action

simplesect.para: Interrupt Class Struct defining interrupt class and recover action

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 WordOffset, const u32 *DataArrayPtr, u32 NumData)
